candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label at top of income statement; matches total revenue/sales.
Also a direct top-line revenue label with identical values; suitable alternate label across periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest income from assets at amortised cost
candidates.why: Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income-related metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Using both direct revenue labels as a priority list because they appear to represent the same top-line item across periods.

candidates.why: Best match to direct production/service costs; typical COGS component.
M&A-related cost, not cost of goods sold.
Inventory asset on balance sheet, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line rather than broader operating expense totals.

candidates.why: Broad overhead bucket and explicit candidate, but appears only in one recent year; useful for coverage where explicit SG&A subtotal is absent.
Classic overhead component; excludes direct material cost and D&A lines.
Classic overhead component; major SG&A element.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; include in XSGA so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet intangible asset, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet current liability/accrual, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Chose overhead buckets and included R&D because it is separately reported above operating profit and should be netted out later via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD. Excluded Material cost, depreciation, amortisation, impairments, and totals.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization supplemental disclosure, not current-period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Balance sheet capitalized development asset, not period expense.
Balancing value on balance sheet, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. Also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS to allow subtraction in PROF formula.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense total that would overlap with more granular interest components if selected together.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on debt/borrowings.
Explicitly non-interest; should be excluded.
Recurring lease interest; should be included as financing cost.
Earnings attribution, not interest expense.
Earnings attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/sign-flipped presentation of lease interest; avoid double counting versus main line.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over total Financial expenses to avoid including FX and other non-interest finance items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance sheet book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Direct owner/parent equity line on balance sheet; preferred because it excludes NCI.
Total equity includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when owner equity exists.
Balancing item, not primary equity line.
Balancing item, not primary equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total assets/equity+liabilities, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interest, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement earnings attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet minority line; useful alternate label across periods.

variables.notes: Using both balance sheet minority-interest labels as a priority list since they appear to represent the same concept across periods.
